title: chore: cleanup, compile check, README + release
description:
Final cleanup tasks before release.

## Tasks
- Remove assets/credentials/ from pubspec (no longer bundled)
- flutter analyze clean pass
- flutter test all passing
- dart format lib/ test/
- README: add Google Sheets service account setup guide (step-by-step)
- flutter build apk --debug passes
- Bump version to 1.0.8+9

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 8–10

title: feat: rewrite HomeController + HomeView with dynamic template pipeline
description:
Replace Regsosek-specific controller/view with generic template-driven UI.

## HomeController Changes
- Remove artList, rutaList, ddList
- Add discoveredTemplates, selectedTemplate, records
- pickAndLoadBackup(): extracts zip, discovers templates, shows picker if multiple
- exportToExcel(): dynamic columns from template.fields
- uploadToSheets(): dynamic columns, sheet tab = template.dataKey
- shareExcel(): share saved .xlsx file

## HomeView Changes
- Drop zone → picks backup zip
- Survey picker bottom sheet (when multiple templates found)
- Action row: Share, Clear, Export Excel, Upload Sheets
- Dynamic DataTable2 with columns from selected template
- Settings icon in AppBar → navigate to /settings

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 6–7

title: feat: FasihBackupReader service — template discovery + answer extraction
description:
Service that reads a FASIH backup ZIP, discovers survey templates, and extracts respondent answers mapped to template fields.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/services/fasih_backup_reader.dart

## Responsibilities
- extractZip(File): extracts to app documents dir, returns Directory
- discoverTemplates(Directory): scans Template/ subfolder, returns List<FasihTemplate>
- loadRecords(Directory, FasihTemplate): walks UUID respondent folders, finds data.json files matching templateId, returns List<FasihRecord>

## Skip dirs: Template, env, lookup, formengine, backup

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Task 5

title: feat: settings repository + screen for Google Sheets credentials
description:
User-managed service account JSON credentials stored in SharedPreferences. Settings screen with file picker for JSON import + spreadsheet ID/URL field.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/repositories/settings_repository.dart: SharedPreferences wrapper, validates service_account JSON, extracts sheet ID from URL
- lib/app/modules/settings/: controller, view, binding, route

## Key Behaviors
- Validate JSON has type=service_account, client_email, private_key
- Parse spreadsheet ID from full Google Sheets URL
- Sheet tab name auto-generated from survey dataKey (no user input needed)

## Tests
- test/repositories/settings_repository_test.dart

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 3–4

title: feat: domain models — FasihTemplate, FasihTemplateField, FasihRecord
description:
Replace hardcoded ARTFields/RutaFields/DDFields with generic models that parse any FASIH survey template JSON.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/models/fasih_template.dart: parses template JSON, flattens component tree, strips HTML labels
- lib/app/data/models/fasih_record.dart: holds answer map, normalizes answer formats ([value] label)

## Deleted Files
- lib/app/data/models/art_fields.dart
- lib/app/data/models/art_data_source.dart
- lib/app/data/models/ruta_fields.dart
- lib/app/data/models/ruta_data_source.dart
- lib/app/data/models/dd_fields.dart

## Tests
- test/models/fasih_template_test.dart

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Task 2

title: chore: flutter 3 / dart 3 upgrade + package cleanup
description:
Upgrade SDK constraint to >=3.0.0 <4.0.0, remove flutter_config, update all packages to latest, fix deprecated APIs.

## Changes
- pubspec.yaml: bump sdk, update all deps, remove flutter_config/async_zip/url
- android/AndroidManifest.xml: add Android 13+ media permissions
- lib/app/data/core/utils/helpers.dart: fix deprecated Permission API

## Deprecated API Fixes
- Share.shareFiles → Share.shareXFiles
- MaterialStateProperty → WidgetStateProperty
- flutter_config FlutterConfig.get → SharedPreferences
